mapper.sql: cd.code_detail_seq , cd.code_group_seq , cd.parent_detail_seq , cd.code_id , cd.code_value , cd.code_name , cd.code_level , cd.description , cd.sort_order , cd.use_yn , cd.attr1 , cd.attr2 , cd.attr3 , cd.create_dt , cd.create_id , cd.create_ip , cd.modify_dt , cd.modify_id , cd.modify_ip , cd.status
mapper.select:
SELECT
, cg.code_group_id AS codeGroupId , cg.code_group_name AS codeGroupName , p.code_name AS parentCodeName FROM code_detail cd INNER JOIN code_group cg ON cd.code_group_seq = cg.code_group_seq LEFT JOIN code_detail p ON cd.parent_detail_seq = p.code_detail_seq WHERE cd.code_detail_seq = #{codeDetailSeq}
